title: DailyBrief
description: Conductor agent's composed brief shown on /suite home. Replaces the empty redirect with a ranked, action-ready read of the operator's day. Produced by the daily-brief skill, consumed by the suite shell.

organization_id.description: Owner org of the brief. Brief is per-org, per-operator.

user_email.description: The operator the brief is composed for.

composed_at.description: ISO timestamp the brief was composed. Older than 15 min = stale; the skill should recompose.

stale_at.description: Set when the brief is served from cache because the live composition failed. Null otherwise.

totals.description: Aggregated counts surfaced alongside the brief.

id.description: Stable id, e.g. brief:stalled:DEAL-621810:2026-05-30. Same id across recomposes lets the UI dedupe + animate.

priority.description: 1 = surface first (highest deal impact). 5 = pipeline summary, always last.

subheadline.description: Context that doesn't fit on the headline. Optional.

deal_id.description: If the item is about a specific deal, the deal id. Drives deep link.

cta_href.description: Where the operator goes when they click. Must always be set — a non-actionable item doesn't belong in the brief.

prepared_action_id.description: If the item is backed by a prepared-action (e.g. a draft email), the action id so one-click can execute it through the approval lane.

risk.description: Operator-facing risk hint on the item. Sourced from the underlying signal (e.g. pipeline-risk skill).

expires_at.description: If the item is time-bounded (closing this week, lead from last 24h), when it falls off the brief.
